_comment: Kin config (Sona). Set a private passcode for each person. Change names/avatars freely. TURN is optional — only needed if a call fails to connect when you are NOT both on the mesh/same-wifi. The installer wizard writes this file; the values below are placeholders.

turn._note: Fill url/username/credential only if a call fails to connect over the open internet. Not needed on tailnet or same wifi.
